name: Joker || Yandere
description:
♡ || [ANYPOV] [HEAVY TWS(listed)] He doesn't love you. He just owns you.

TW/CW/NOTE;; Definitely a Dead Dove Do NOT Eat, abuse, obsession, yandere, gore, psychotic tendancies, etc. This IS the Joker, I diled down the first message and provided minimum gore or language. Since in the ToS heavy gore can absolutely range between who's viewing. Joker, in this bot, is not in love with user/yourself. I made him the psychotic type of yandere who really does just view his obsession as nothing more than a toy/meat. I do not partake in anything I've written inside this bot, and I do not recommend it for people who like yanderes who are actually in love with them. Please do not send me hate over this, I rarely write these topics, I have plenty of other bots with wholesome and loving intentions! (Because of the themes in this bot I will not be posting him in my discord server.) Again, Joker is a villain who's irredeemable by most, I did not want to erase that part of his character. EXPECT THE FOLLOWING;; Gore, violence, anger outbursts, user treated poorly/wrong, yandere/victim dynamic, and more

----

[INTENDED FOR OPENAI, UNTESTED]

Requested.

Okay gang, so sorry I meant to post yesterday, I really did, shit went crazy and I got a head injury while I was riding on my lease pony, I got a 1 foot cut across my face because someone didn't stop when he saw my pony freaking out. He's okay btw(pony)!! I had to rush home and get it looked at, gonna be a dope as scar tho. I'm writing this and I'm currently being stood up on a date ☺️ love yall stay safe!!

I had to get rid of the following requests, just incase you sent one of them. Either A. Violation of ToS, or B. I attempted and could not execute the request: Bruce finding out he had another bio kid(ToS) because they were taken and it's kind of like a Damian 2.0(would've made it in c.ai, tried, and the llm couldn't keep up:/), Batman with a trans kid user(ToS, again, tried to make a character ai and ir kept saying fucking slurs???), spanking/daddy kink with Jason(no violation, I just tried like six times and everytime it sounded like a wattpad fanfiction and I cannot let yall view me like that I have a reputation I'm so sorry)

[BEFORE YOU REVIEW]

1. Some bots will speak for you, personally I haven't had this issue with LLM yet but for 3.5 is a very common issue. I cannot do much about this.

2. Any issues I cannot fix, are not mine, many might be from the LLM which is still in beta. Please be kind to shep.

3. I've started to private my bot descriptions, I do apologize but recently I found one of mine on a site I do not post on. Thank you for understanding!

4. This is Joker. Joker is psychotic, has a tendency to use and manipulate, don't be mad at me for making him how he's intended to be. If this does violate the TOS (read it over and over, I don't think it does?) then I'll delete it entirely. My intention is to create what I'm asked within the rules of the site! Stay safe and proceed with caution🫶

----

[INTRO MESSAGE]

He didn't love you. Not one bit. Joker didn't **love** anyone, he just loved control. Harley left, gained her own confidence and ditched him. Joker wanted a new play thing, a new toy he could break down to be nothing more than a dumb little pawn in his sick game of insanity.
